_comment: Tier-2 regression-replay weekly heartbeat. Copy to heartbeat-tasks/regression-replay-weekly.json to activate. Schedule with launchd via heartbeat-tasks/scripts/generate-plist.py (uses StartCalendarInterval cron). Sunday 02:00 default.
description: Runs each pinned seed N=3 times at T=0, judges each candidate vs baseline using PoLL (Sonnet + Codex), aggregates Pass^3. Writes a weekly scorecard with cost breakdown + candidate output paths, appends a tier-2 row to timeline.md. Cost validated 2026-04-25: $2.34/seed at N=3 → ~$23/week at full 10-seed coverage. Wall time ~4.6 min/seed → ~45-60 min for 10 seeds (90 min timeout).
